name: Redemption Church
description: Redemption Church is a place to play pickleball in Tell City, IN. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Tell City Pickleball
description: Tell City Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Tell City, IN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
